companies.name: BDE Engineering GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
BDE Engineering GmbH. BDE Engineering GmbH is a Software Development company. BDE Engineering GmbH employs 6 people (+18.8% YoY, +3 people), founded in 1993. Headquartered in Beverungen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.
[...]
Software and hardware for the digitalisation of your production - For over 25 years, we have been a solution provider for manufacturing software and hardware in the context of digitalisation and Industry 4.0. Together with you, we design efficient and sustainable manufacturing processes. 

With comprehensive expertise in MES, machine data acquisition, production data acquisition, key performance indicators (KPI / OEE), dashboard management, quality management, ANDON board monitoring, mobile devices, label printing, energy data, graphic order planning and preventive maintenance, we offer you products and services for digital manufacturing. Data from your machines is delivered to the MES Suite, processed in real time, visualised, evaluated in analyses and key figures and thus made available for every system in the smart factory.
[...]
The modular PROefficient production management system creates transparency in your processes, sustainably optimises your production and workflows and reduces process-related production costs.
[...]
- Industry: Software Development
- Type: Public Company
- Headquarters: Beverungen, Germany
- Founded Year: 1993
- Homepage: bde-en

companies.name: iT ENGINEERING Manufacturing Solutions GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
iT ENGINEERING Manufacturing Solutions GmbH. iT ENGINEERING Manufacturing Solutions GmbH is a IT Services and IT Consulting company. iT Engineering Manufacturing Solutions unterstützt mit der MES-Software EMC bei der Digitalisierung der Fertigung und deren Prozesse auf dem Shopfloor. IT ENGINEERING Manufacturing Solutions GmbH employs 3 people, founded in 1995. Headquartered in Pliezhausen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.
[...]
We are a supplier of a Manufacturing Execution System (MES) for the manufacturing industry. With the software product "MES-Software EMC", the company occupies a leading position in individual industries. EMC is a synonym for success (E) resulting from machine efficiency (M) and controlling (C). 

The modular MES software EMC for detailed production planning, operating, machine and process data acquisition (PDA/MDA/PDA) as well as monitoring and reporting enables the support and optimization of integrated production processes. The MES software EMC acts as a central information hub and ensures transparent production processes, flexibility and cost efficiency by integrating production data.
